description: ondata.github.io is a GitHub Pages site for onData projects. It presents tools for working with open data and Italian legal texts, including a CKAN-focused MCP server project and a Normattiva-to-Markdown converter.
summary: ondata.github.io publishes a public hosted MCP server landing page for CKAN open data exploration and a public Python CLI/tool page for converting Normattiva laws to Markdown; no ondata.github.io-hosted HTTP or GraphQL API surface was found.
